nodes.name: 中树雀
nodes.summary: 中树雀（Medium tree finch，学名 Camarhynchus pauper），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于弗洛雷安納島，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、外来捕食者。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 弗洛雷安納島
nodes.summary: 弗洛雷安納島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括中树雀、大嘴地雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is only found on Floreana Island at elevations above in moist highland forest habitats, across an range of about 24 km². Prime breeding habitat is dominated by Scalesia pedunculata trees, although the species also occurs in the surrounding agricultural zones. A 2008 survey estimated the number of medium tree finches as 1,620,{{Cite journal |last=O’Connor |first=Jody A

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The medium tree finch is threatened by introduced predators such as rats, mice, cats, and the smooth-billed ani, as well as habitat loss, which has occurred through clearance for agriculture

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The medium tree finch is threatened by introduced predators such as rats, mice, cats, and the smooth-billed ani, as well as habitat loss, which has occurred through clearance for agriculture
